summary: Iter 218 backend regression — verified per-unit amount discount math at /api/unified-sale and permission gating at /api/inventory/admin-adjust + /api/products. All 6 supplied tests pass + 5 additional edge cases I authored also pass (11/11). No regressions introduced.

supplied_tests_iter218 (6/6 PASS): test_amount_discount_is_per_unit_not_flat_per_line — qty 10 x P5 disc -> discount_amount=50, line_total=950
additional_edge_tests (5/5 PASS): qty=1 amount disc collapses to flat (P7)
decimal qty 2.5 x P4 = P10 disc
manager WITH inventory.adjust=True NOT blocked (positive case)

critical_code_review_comments: sales.py line 456: per-unit math 'qty * disc_val' is correct and consistent (rounded to 2 dp). Capital-floor recheck after discount on line 459-466 uses net_per_unit which works correctly with the new math.
inventory.py line 412: gate uses 'user.role != admin AND not has_perm(..., inventory, adjust)' — short-circuits correctly; admins unaffected.

Note: 18 unrelated pre-existing test ERRORS in test_invoice_edit.py / test_sales_bug_fixes_134.py are due to those files reading REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL which is not set in the backend test env. NOT caused by Iter 218.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_perunit_discount_edges_218.py (NEW — 5 edge cases authored by testing agent)
test_credentials: test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 (auto-seeded). Manager users created per-test with random emails @regression.local.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own product + branch + temporary manager user via direct MongoDB insert with bcrypt-hashed password.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 218 backend changes verified 100% on 11 tests. The pre-existing 18 ERRORs in test_invoice_edit.py / test_sales_bug_fixes_134.py are due to REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var missing in backend pytest env — unrelated, recurring across iterations.
rca_notes: BUG #1 root cause: /api/unified-sale used 'qty * rate - disc_val' for amount discounts -> flat PX per line regardless of qty. Fix: 'disc_amt = qty * disc_val' for amount type. Verified persisted invoice line.discount_amount and line.total reflect per-unit math. BUG #2a root cause: /api/inventory/admin-adjust had no perm check; relied on UI hiding the button. Fix: explicit role+perm gate raised at top of handler. Verified 403 for manager without perm and 200 for both admin and manager-with-perm.
